_comment: Trimmed GET /types/{id} response (spike #161). Real catalogue data (public). Only the value-relevant fields are kept: composition.text + weight drive the metal-value resolver (later slice); value/title/issuer are for display. The live response also carries obverse/reverse/comments/references/edge/mints, omitted here.
title: 1 Dollar "American Silver Eagle" (Bullion Coin)
